notes: 3.10.90 — CHUYEN 'Phan tich Kho & Mua hang' sang nhom BAO CAO (Sep duyet): dung ban chat dashboard quan tri chi-doc (ADR-INV-DASHBOARD-001), doi tuong chinh BGD/KT/Mua hang; nhom Bao cao la noi tap trung dashboard phan tich dai han (Tai chinh/HR dung chung Semantic Layer sau nay ve cung cho). Thay doi: nav item chuyen tu nhom Kho sang sau BCQT (icon doi 📉 tranh trung 📊 BCQT) + TAB_GROUPS. KHONG doi: quyen canAccessTab/gate 2 truc, render, page container, scope — ai thay duoc van thay dung nhu cu, chi doi cho dung menu. Kem: quet bo sung Unicode Minus — 4 formatter hien thi con sot (fmtShort/fmtRich/fmtMoney BCQT) chuyen U+2212; 2 cho o NHAP LIEU giu hyphen ASCII (dung ranh gioi nguoi-doc/may-doc cua chuan 4b). Bao gom 3.10.42-89. Rollback=3.10.41.
